acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using LTX-VIDEO (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, you may not access or use the Service. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access the Service.

services.title: 2. Description of Services
services.content: LTX-VIDEO provides an AI-powered cinematic video generation platform that allows users to create, edit, and export video content from text prompts. The Service includes web-based tools, APIs, rendering infrastructure, and related features.

accounts.title: 3. User Accounts
accounts.content: You must create an account to use certain features of the Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You must provide accurate and complete information when creating your account and keep it updated.

content.title: 4. User Content
content.content: You retain ownership of the content you create using the Service. By using the Service, you grant LTX-VIDEO a non-exclusive, worldwide license to host, store, and process your content solely to provide and improve the Service. You are solely responsible for the content you generate and must ensure it complies with applicable laws.

ip.title: 5. Intellectual Property
ip.content: The Service, including its design, features, and underlying technology, is owned by LTX AI Visuals and protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse-engineer any part of the Service without prior written consent.

prohibited.title: 6. Prohibited Uses
prohibited.content: You may not use the Service to generate content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable. You may not use the Service to create deepfakes or misleading content intended to deceive. Automated access, scraping, or overloading the Service is prohibited without authorization.

termination.title: 7. Termination
termination.content: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, with or without cause. Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately. You may also delete your account at any time through your account settings.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. LTX AI Visuals shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the Service. Our total liability shall not exceed the amount you paid for the Service in the twelve months preceding the claim.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will notify users of material changes via email or through the Service. Your continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised terms.

contact.title: 10. Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about these Terms of Use, please contact us at legal@ltx-video.com.

collection.title: 1. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly (name, email, payment details) when you create an account, as well as usage data (IP address, browser type, device information, pages visited) automatically through cookies and similar technologies. We may also collect content you generate through the Service.

usage.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use your information to provide and maintain the Service, process transactions, send communications, improve our AI models and rendering quality, detect fraud and abuse, and comply with legal obligations. We do not use your generated content to train our models without your explicit consent.

sharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. We may share data with service providers who assist in operating the Service (hosting, analytics, payment processing), when required by law, or in connection with a business transfer. All third-party providers are bound by contractual obligations to protect your data.

cookies.title: 4. Cookies & Tracking
cookies.content: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management, functional cookies to remember your preferences (language, theme), and analytics cookies to understand usage patterns. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest, access controls, and regular security audits. However, no method of transmission over the Internet is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain your account information for as long as your account is active. Generated content is stored according to your subscription plan. After account deletion, we remove your personal data within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.

rights.title: 7. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data, request data portability, and object to processing. For EU/EEA residents, these rights are guaranteed under GDPR. For California residents, additional rights apply under CCPA. To exercise your rights, contact us at privacy@ltx-video.com.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.content: The Service is not intended for users under the age of 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children. If we become aware that a child has provided us with personal data, we will take steps to delete it promptly.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of material changes via email or a prominent notice on the Service. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.content: For questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact our Data Protection Officer at privacy@ltx-video.com.

ApiDocs.title: API Documentation
ApiDocs.subtitle: Complete reference for integrating LTX-VIDEO into your applications. Generate cinematic videos programmatically with our REST API.

overview.description: The LTX-VIDEO API lets you generate, extend, and manipulate cinematic videos from text prompts, images, or audio. All endpoints accept and return JSON. Use cookie-based or Bearer token authentication.

auth.description: All protected endpoints require authentication. After signing in, include your session token either as a cookie (automatic in browsers) or as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.

prompts.description: Writing effective prompts is key to generating high-quality cinematic videos. Follow these guidelines to get the best results from the LTX-VIDEO engine.
prompts.structureDesc: For best results, structure your prompts with camera movement, subject, action, environment, and lighting/mood descriptors.
prompts.good1: Slow dolly forward through a misty redwood forest at dawn, golden light filtering through ancient trees, volumetric fog, cinematic depth of field
prompts.good2: Aerial drone shot circling a lighthouse on a rocky cliff during a storm, dramatic waves crashing, dark clouds, moody cinematic lighting
prompts.good3: Close-up tracking shot of a vintage sports car racing through neon-lit city streets at night, rain reflections on asphalt, anamorphic lens flares
prompts.bad1Reason: Too vague, no camera or lighting details
prompts.bad2: Make me a cool video with lots of stuff happening
prompts.bad2Reason: No specific subject, action, or cinematic direction
prompts.negativeDesc: Use the negative_prompt field to exclude unwanted elements from the generation. This helps the model avoid common artifacts.
prompts.paramFrames: Total frames to generate. 121 frames at 24fps = ~5 seconds of video
prompts.paramFps: Frame rate. 24.0 for cinematic, 30.0 for smooth motion
prompts.paramNegative: Comma-separated list of elements to avoid in generation

video.description: Create cinematic videos using various generation modes. All video jobs are processed asynchronously — monitor progress via WebSocket.
video.textToVideo: Generate a video from a text prompt describing the desired cinematic scene.
video.imageToVideo: Animate a static image into a cinematic video sequence with camera motion.
video.audioToVideo: Generate visuals synchronized to an audio track.
video.retake: Re-generate a specific segment of an existing video with a new prompt.
video.extend: Extend an existing video by appending additional generated frames.
video.health: Check if the API service is running and responsive.
video.userMe: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile, credits, and role.

upload.description: Upload images, videos, or audio files to use as inputs for video generation. Files are stored in our S3-compatible storage and referenced by URI.
upload.endpoint: Upload a file via multipart form data. Max 50MB. Returns a storage URI for use in generation endpoints.

websocket.description: Track real-time progress of video generation jobs. Connect after creating a job to receive status updates and the final video URL.
websocket.endpoint: Connect to receive real-time progress updates for a specific job.

webhook.description: RunPod sends a webhook callback when GPU processing completes. This endpoint is used internally by the infrastructure.
webhook.endpoint: Receives job completion callbacks from RunPod GPU workers.

errors.description: The API uses standard HTTP status codes. Error responses include a JSON body with a detail message.
errors.400: Bad Request — Invalid parameters or missing required fields.
errors.401: Unauthorized — Authentication required or token expired.
errors.402: Payment Required — Insufficient credits for this operation.
errors.403: Forbidden — You don't have permission for this resource.
errors.404: Not Found — The requested resource does not exist.
errors.429: Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded. Retry after cooldown.
errors.500: Internal Server Error — Something went wrong on our end.

sdk.title: TypeScript SDK Example
sdk.description: A complete example showing how to create a video, monitor progress via WebSocket, and upload assets using the API.

promptAI.description: Enhance prompts with AI and browse pre-made cinematic templates. The enhance endpoint uses Gemini to transform simple descriptions into detailed cinematic prompts.
promptAI.enhance: Enhance a text prompt into a detailed cinematic description using AI.
promptAI.templates: List all available prompt templates. Optionally filter by category (cinematic, anime, macro, film, abstract, nature).
promptAI.templateById: Retrieve a specific prompt template by its ID.

galleryApi.description: Browse public videos, toggle likes, manage visibility, and remix prompts. The public feed is accessible without authentication.
galleryApi.publicFeed: Get a paginated feed of public videos. Supports sorting by recent, popular, or most liked.
galleryApi.sharePage: Get a single video by its share ID for the public share page. Increments view count.
galleryApi.like: Toggle like on a video. Returns the new like state and count.
galleryApi.visibility: Change a video's visibility (PRIVATE, PUBLIC, or UNLISTED). Owner only.
galleryApi.remix: Get the prompt and settings of a public video to use as a starting point.

foldersApi.description: Organize your videos into folders. Create, rename, delete folders and move videos between them.
foldersApi.create: Create a new folder for organizing videos.
foldersApi.list: List all folders belonging to the authenticated user.
foldersApi.delete: Delete a folder. All videos inside are moved back to root.
foldersApi.move: Move one or more videos into a folder.

referralsApi.description: Invite friends and earn credits. Each successful referral awards 5 credits to both the referrer and the referee. Maximum 20 referrals per user.
referralsApi.myCode: Get or generate your unique referral code.
referralsApi.stats: Get your referral statistics including total referrals, completed referrals, and credits earned.
referralsApi.validate: Validate a referral code during signup. Returns whether the code is valid.

notificationsApi.description: Manage email notification preferences. Control when you receive emails about video completions, failures, and product updates.
notificationsApi.get: Get the current email notification preferences for the authenticated user.
notificationsApi.update: Update one or more notification preferences. Only the fields you send will be changed.

adminApi.description: Admin-only endpoints for content moderation. Requires ADMIN role. Review flagged content and approve or reject it.
adminApi.queue: Get the list of flagged videos pending moderation review. Admin only.
adminApi.review: Approve or reject a flagged video. Accepts 'approve' or 'reject' action. Admin only.

Validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

Support.title: Help & Support
Support.subtitle: Get help and find answers to your questions about LTX-VIDEO.

generateVideo.q: How do I generate a video?
generateVideo.a: Go to your Dashboard, type a description of your desired video in the prompt box, and click Generate. Our AI will create a video based on your text in a few minutes.

credits.a: Each video generation costs credits depending on resolution and duration. You receive free credits on sign-up. You can purchase additional credits from the Billing section in Settings.

formats.q: What video formats and resolutions are supported?
formats.a: LTX-VIDEO supports MP4 output in multiple resolutions including 480p, 720p, and 1080p. You can also choose different aspect ratios (16:9, 9:16, 1:1) depending on your needs.

processing.q: How long does video generation take?
processing.a: Most videos are generated within 1-5 minutes depending on the complexity, resolution, and current server load. You'll be notified once your video is ready.

share.q: Can I share my generated videos?
share.a: Yes! Each video has a unique share link. You can also publish your best creations to the public Gallery for the community to discover.

account.q: How do I manage my account?
account.a: Visit the Settings page to change your language, notification preferences, and referral options. Go to your Profile page to update your display name or delete your account.

Support.stillNeedHelpDesc: Our support team typically responds within 24 hours.
